folders.name: 00_CONTROL_CENTER
folders.purpose: governance, indexes, logs and automation control

folders.name: 01_INBOX
folders.purpose: single intake point for new and unclassified materials

folders.name: 02_Brand_Context
folders.purpose: brandbooks, tone, visual and communication context

folders.name: 03_Object_Data
folders.purpose: object-level factual materials and property data

folders.name: 04_Standards_SOP
folders.purpose: standards, SOPs, scripts and operating procedures

folders.name: 05_Official_Sites
folders.purpose: official site pages and guest-facing web content

folders.name: 06_OTA
folders.purpose: OTA profiles, descriptions and platform materials

controlCenterSubfolders.name: 98_Project_Methodology
controlCenterSubfolders.purpose: Stage 0 methodology and project framing artifacts

controlCenterSubfolders.name: 99_Setup_Archive
controlCenterSubfolders.purpose: bootstrap, setup and historical automation artifacts

obviousDuplicateRule.execution: Strict GitHub runtime moves obvious duplicates to the pending-trash quarantine folder and logs them; Drive trash is not used as the default service-account action.
obviousDuplicateRule.fallbackExecution: If quarantine move is denied, log manual_owner_action_required with the Drive error. Permanent delete is never used.
